name: Heritage Serif
concept: An elegant high-contrast serif wordmark in which a custom-drawn 'C' cradles a fine Archimedean chakli spiral, finished with a gold sesame accent. A refined, letter-spaced 'HOMEMADE / CHAKLI & CHIVDA' descriptor lockup keeps it timeless and premium.

name: Warm & Homemade
concept: A friendly, rounded lowercase 'cmaa' in a soft bold sans, gently cradled by a terracotta-to-mustard swash that connects the two a's and buds into a tiny leaf, with a sesame-dot tittle above. Approachable and cosy yet still classy, with a clean one-colour version.

name: Gold Seal Monogram
concept: A foil-stamp-quality 'C + chakli-spiral' monogram seal in gold on ink — a pure-vector mark that works as a favicon, app icon or wax seal — paired in a horizontal lockup with the Fraunces 'Cmaa' wordmark and a stacked descriptor for a luxe, giftable Diwali feel.
